name: HANS-MD
description: HANS MD — A feature-rich, identity-driven WhatsApp Multi-Device bot built on Baileys.

SESSION_ID.description: Pre-linked session ID from the cloud vault (e.g. HANS-BYTE~xxxx). Use this OR OWNER_NUMBER.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp phone number with country code (e.g. 237680260772). Use this OR SESSION_ID.

BOT_NAME.description: Display name of your bot shown in menus and messages.

OWNER_NAME.description: Your display name shown in bot info.

PREFIX.description: Command prefix character(s). Separate multiple with commas e.g. '.,!'

AUTO_REACT.description: Automatically react with an emoji to every incoming message (true/false).

ANTI_DELETE.description: Log deleted messages and resend them to the owner (true/false).

AUTO_READ.description: Automatically mark all incoming messages as read (true/false).

AUTO_STATUS_LIKE.description: Automatically react with a random emoji to status updates (true/false).

AUTO_TYPING.description: Show typing indicator when processing commands (true/false).

AUTO_RECORDING.description: Show audio recording indicator when processing commands (true/false).

ALWAYS_ONLINE.description: Keep the bot's WhatsApp presence always shown as Online (true/false).

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Custom AES-256 key for encrypting the anti-delete messages database at rest. Auto-generated if omitted.

GIFTED_API_KEY.description: API key for Gifted Baileys extended media features.

TG_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram Bot Token for forwarding fatal crash reports to Telegram (Optional).

TG_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram Chat ID to receive crash reports (Optional, used with TG_BOT_TOKEN).
